allow: Bash(python -c "from app import app, RealAnalyzer; print\('Import OK'\); a = RealAnalyzer\('https://example.com'\); print\('RealAnalyzer OK'\)")

Bash(.conda\\python.exe shopmind-ai/app.py --check)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\shopmind-ai"; $python = ".\\.conda\\python.exe"; & $python -c "import flask; import requests; import bs4; print\('flask:', flask.__version__\); print\('requests:', requests.__version__\); print\('bs4:', bs4.__version__\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($body = '{"url":"https://www.trendyol.com/apple/iphone-15-p-805635130"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/analyze" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 60 -SessionVariable sess -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { "HATA: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $body = '{"url":"https://www.trendyol.com/apple/iphone-15-p-805635130"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/analyze" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 60 -SessionVariable sess -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "Content length: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; $r.Content[0..300] -join '' } catch { "HATA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\shopmind-ai\\shopmind-ai"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\shopmind-ai\\.conda\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "app.py" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\flask_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\flask_err.txt" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\flask_out.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\flask_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($body = '{"url":"https://www.trendyol.com/apple/iphone-15-p-805635130"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/analyze" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 60 -SessionVariable sess -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "Size: $\($r.Content.Length\) chars"; $r.Content } catch { "HATA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/results" -WebSession $sess -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "Analiz Sonuçları"\) { "SONUC: results.html yuklu - BASARILI" } elseif \($r.Content -match "ShopMind AI - Akıllı"\) { "SONUC: index.html yuklu - SESSION KAYBOLDU \(cookie cok buyuk\)" } else { "SONUC: Belirsiz - $\($r.Content.Length\) chars" } } catch { "HATA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd "c:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\shopmind-ai\\shopmind-ai"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Desktop\\shopmind-ai\\.conda\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "app.py" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\flask_out2.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\flask_err2.txt" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\flask_err2.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String "Running|Error|Traceback")

PowerShell($body = '{"url":"https://www.trendyol.com/apple/iphone-15-p-805635130"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/analyze" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 60 -SessionVariable sess -UseBasicParsing; "Analyze status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content; Start-Sleep 1; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/results" -WebSession $sess -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; if \($r2.Content -match "Analiz Sonuçları"\) { "RESULTS: BASARILI - results.html yuklu" } elseif \($r2.Content -match "Akıllı Ürün"\) { "RESULTS: BASARISIZ - index.html dondu \(session kayboldu\)" } else { "RESULTS: status=$\($r2.StatusCode\) len=$\($r2.Content.Length\)" } } catch { "HATA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"url":"https://www.hepsiburada.com/samsung-galaxy-s24-128-gb-pm-HBC00006KLAC"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/analyze" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 60 -SessionVariable sess2 -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/results" -WebSession $sess2 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if \($r2.Content -match "Analiz Sonuçları"\) { "HB TEST: BASARILI" } else { "HB TEST: BASARISIZ" } } catch { "HATA: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
